RQ  Number IN_PROGRESS Production
RQ  Priority Production
Priority Manager
RQ pending orders
func:
msg.topic = "SELECT order_id, nb_product, product_type, status, priority FROM Orders WHERE status IN ('PAUSED', 'QUEUED') ORDER BY priority DESC, order_id ASC;";

return msg;

name: Select Order
Update Priority
Select Used Stations
func:
msg.topic = `
SELECT 
    p.current_station, 
    p.productSN, 
    p.order_id, 
    p.cart_id, 
    o.priority,
    pr.*
FROM Production p
JOIN Orders o ON p.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN Products pr ON o.product_type = pr.product_type
WHERE p.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND p.current_station != 'OUT';
`;
return msg;

name: Organize Infos

format:
PRIO
STATION {{i}}
ORDER: #{{msg.payload['Station'+i].order}}
CART: {{msg.payload['Station'+i].cart}}
{{msg.payload['Station'+i].op}}
Empty Station
